display.purpose: 最大级标题,极少使用 (.SF Pro Display w700).

display-medium.purpose: 屏幕主标题 (.SF Pro Display w700).

timer-display.purpose: 计时器倒计时大号数字 — 唯一使用 Orbitron 的角色,全屏视觉中心.

title.purpose: 卡片/列表项标题 (.SF Pro Text w600, tabular-nums).

label.purpose: 按钮/徽章/芯片文字 (.SF Pro Text w500, tabular-nums).

shadows.name: resting
shadows.purpose: 卡片静止时的微妙阴影,让卡片浮一点.

shadows.name: floating
shadows.purpose: FAB、对话框、底部弹层,打断层级的最大阴影.

motion.name: press-scale
motion.purpose: 所有可按压按钮的统一反馈 (PressableMixin). 圆形按钮 0.92, 胶囊按钮 0.95.

motion.name: page-fade-up
motion.purpose: 全局页面转场,所有导航使用.

motion.name: page-scale-fade
motion.purpose: 强调性页面转场 (如详情页).

breakpoints.name: timer-size-clamp
breakpoints.purpose: 计时器圆形尺寸响应式 — screenWidth × 0.9 clamp(280, 400).

breakpoints.name: timer-small-clamp
breakpoints.purpose: 小号计时器尺寸 (训练进行中的迷你倒计时).

components.name: Circular Control Button
components.description: 计时器周围的圆形操作按钮 — 参考图核心样式,白色圆 + 深色图标 + 按下缩放.
components.html: <button class="ds-circular-btn" aria-label="开始"><svg width="25" height="25" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M8 5v14l11-7z"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-circular-btn { width: 56px; height: 56px; border-radius: 9999px; background: #FFFFFF; color: #212121; border: none; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(33,33,33,0.12), 0 2px 10px transparent; transition: transform 0.1s ease-out; } .ds-circular-btn:hover { box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(33,33,33,0.16); } .ds-circular-btn:active { transform: scale(0.92); } .ds-circular-btn:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #1A237E; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Primary Action Button
components.description: 深靛蓝胶囊主操作按钮 — 承载'开始训练''保存'等主要动作.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { height: 56px; padding: 0 24px; border-radius: 28px; background: #1A237E; color: #FFFFFF; border: none; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; font-family: '.SF Pro Text', -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 16px; letter-spacing: 0.5px; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(26,35,126,0.3), 0 2px 10px transparent; transition: transform 0.1s ease-out, box-shadow 0.1s ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(26,35,126,0.4); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.95); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #536DFE; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: 描边胶囊次要按钮 — 透明背景 + 强调色描边,用于'取消''查看全部'.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { height: 56px; padding: 0 20px; border-radius: 28px; background: transparent; color: #1A237E; border: 2px solid rgba(26,35,126,0.5); display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; font-family: '.SF Pro Text', -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 15px; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.1s ease-out; } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform: scale(0.95); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #536DFE; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Flat Card
components.description: 列表项/信息块的标准容器 — raised 表面层级 + 16px 圆角 + raised 阴影.
components.html:
卧推

4 组 × 8-10 次
components.css: .ds-flat-card { padding: 16px; border-radius: 16px; background: #F5F5F5; box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(33,33,33,0.12), 0 2px 10px transparent; } .ds-card-title { margin: 0 0 4px 0; font-family: '.SF Pro Text', -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 16px; color: #212121; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-card-body { margin: 0; font-family: '.SF Pro Text', -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 400; font-size: 14px; color: #757575; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }

components.name: Flat Badge
components.description: 强调色胶囊标签 — 15% tint 背景 + 强调色文字 (The 15% Tint Rule).
components.html: 已完成
components.css: .ds-flat-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 8px 14px; border-radius: 20px; background: rgba(26,35,126,0.15); color: #1A237E; font-family: '.SF Pro Text', -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 13px; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: 状态徽章 — 任意 color 的 15% tint 背景 + 30% tint 描边,用于状态标记.
components.css: .ds-status-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 20px; background: rgba(76,175,80,0.15); border: 1px solid rgba(76,175,80,0.3); color: #4CAF50; font-family: '.SF Pro Text', -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 13px; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }

components.name: Progress Ring
components.description: 计时器核心视觉 — 10px 描边深靛蓝渐变进度环,起始角顶部,唯一允许的 MaskFilter 柔化.
components.css: .ds-progress-ring { position: relative; width: 280px; height: 280px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } .ds-progress-track { position: absolute; inset: 0; border-radius: 9999px; border: 10px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2); } .ds-progress-track::after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: -10px; border-radius: 9999px; border: 10px solid #1A237E; border-color: #1A237E transparent transparent transparent; transform: rotate(135deg); filter: blur(8px); opacity: 0.999; } .ds-progress-value { font-family: 'Orbitron', monospace; font-weight: 700; font-size: 72px; color: #212121; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }

components.name: Floating Nav Bar
components.description: 浮动底部导航 — extendBody, 70px 高, 25px 4角圆角, 中心 70px 计时按钮为锚点.
components.html: <nav class="ds-navbar"><button class="ds-nav-btn">计划</button><button class="ds-nav-btn">历史</button><button class="ds-nav-center">计时</button><button class="ds-nav-btn">统计</button><button class="ds-nav-btn">设置</button></nav>
components.css: .ds-navbar { position: absolute; left: 16px; right: 16px; bottom: 16px; height: 70px; border-radius: 25px; background: #FFFFFF; box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(33,33,33,0.12), 0 4px 16px transparent; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-around; padding: 0 8px; } .ds-nav-btn { background: none; border: none; color: #757575; font-family: '.SF Pro Text', -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; cursor: pointer; } .ds-nav-center { width: 70px; height: 70px; border-radius: 9999px; border: none; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #FFB74D, #FFA726); color: #1A237E; margin-top: -20px; box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(255,167,38,0.4); cursor: pointer; font-weight: 600; }

narrative.overview: 撸铁计时器的视觉系统是一场温度的对决:背景是汗水——温暖的渐变(琥珀金/珊瑚橙/天际蓝),传递'运动值得,坚持值得'的活力;强调色是冷静——深靛蓝 (#1A237E) 像纪律一样压在暖背景上,给整个界面重量、方向、可读性。一个负责燃烧,一个负责专注。缺了任何一个,系统就塌了。这是一个扁平系统:没有玻璃模糊、没有发光辉光、没有装饰性渐变文字。深度由三层 elevation 通过克制的阴影传达。计时器是绝对的视觉中心,其他一切退后。
keyCharacteristics: 温度对决:暖背景 vs 深靛蓝,缺一不可
彻底扁平:无发光、无玻璃、无渐变文字
大号可扫读:计时器数字是绝对中心
温柔圆角 + 实在按钮:16-28px 圆角,白色圆形按钮按下缩放
三层 elevation:resting / raised / floating,克制阴影
色盲安全:数据可视化用 Okabe-Ito 调色板

rules.name: The Duality Rule
rules.body: 暖背景与深靛蓝强调必须同时在场。一个屏幕不能只有暖色(轻浮),也不能只有深蓝(冰冷)。

rules.name: The 15% Tint Rule
rules.body: 强调色作为'激活态'背景时,一律用 accentColor.withValues(alpha: 0.15)。15% 是甜点:够看见,不喧宾夺主。

rules.name: The Sky-Blue Exception Rule
rules.body: skyBlue 主题背景已是蓝色,强调色改用更深的 #0D47A1。每个主题的强调色必须能'压住'自己的背景。

rules.name: The Tabular-Numbers Rule
rules.body: 任何会变化的数字(倒计时、组数、重量、统计值)必须用 FontFeature.tabularFigures()。等宽数字防止跳动。

rules.name: The One Display Font Rule
rules.body: Orbitron/Rajdhani 只用于计时器倒计时数字,不用于标题、按钮、正文。它的稀缺性正是它的力量。

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: 表面静止时是平的。阴影只在状态改变时出现(提升、悬浮、聚焦)。

rules.name: The No-Glow Rule
rules.body: 禁止发光效果(glow、外辉光、彩色光晕)。进度环的 MaskFilter.blur(8) 是唯一例外且仅用于抗锯齿柔化。

dos: Do 保持暖背景与深靛蓝强调同时在场 (The Duality Rule)
Do 用 AppThemeData 字段取色,永不硬编码 Colors.white/Colors.black
Do 让计时器倒计时数字用 Orbitron 并占据视觉中心
Do 给所有会变化的数字加 FontFeature.tabularFigures()
Do 用 AppElevation.resting/raised/floating 三层阴影
Do 用 AppDimensions 的 8 级圆角 token
Do 激活态背景统一用 accentColor.withValues(alpha: 0.15)
Do 所有可交互元素 >= 48dp 触控目标
Do 图表用 ChartPalette (Okabe-Ito),不用品牌深靛蓝
Do 所有 CircularControlButton 传 semanticLabel
donts: Don't 做成'广告堆满的健身 App' — 计时器界面永不出现推销元素
Don't 做成'冷冰冰的临床记录器' — 温度由暖背景对决承载
Don't 用 glassmorphism / 毛玻璃作为默认装饰
Don't 加发光效果 (glow、彩色光晕、外辉光)
Don't 用 background-clip: text 渐变文字 — 用单色
Don't 做成'千篇一律的 SaaS 仪表盘' — 英雄数字大卡片是反例
Don't 用 border-left/border-right > 1px 做彩色侧条
Don't 在卡片上同时堆 1px border + 宽软阴影 — 选其一
Don't 卡片圆角超过 16px — radiusXl 是卡片上限
Don't 让 Orbitron 出现在标题、按钮或正文
